summary: React SPA completa com 10 páginas, 9 componentes, integração total com API backend, design system fiel ao design_spec.md

features: SVG donut chart gastos por categoria
Card summary com barra de uso do limite
Tela de sucesso com saldo atualizado
Lista de chaves Pix do usuário
Fatura atual com lista de compras

ui.Button: 4 variants (primary, secondary, ghost, danger), 3 sizes, loading spinner, left/right icons
ui.Card: 2 variants (default, highlighted), 4 paddings, sub-components (Header, Title, Content)
ui.Input: Label, error, hint, left/right icons, forwardRef
ui.Modal: Escape key, backdrop click, scroll lock, 3 sizes
ui.Badge: 6 variants (success, warning, danger, info, lime, default)
ui.Table: Full table primitives (Table, Header, Body, Row, Head, Cell)

layout.Sidebar: Desktop nav com 6 itens, user info, logout (hidden em mobile)
layout.Header: Greeting dinâmico, notificações com dropdown (unread count, mark as read, polling 30s)

services.api: Fetch wrapper com Bearer token, error handling (ApiError class), skipAuth option
services.useAuth: Auth state completo (login, register, logout), localStorage persistence, token validation on mount
services.formatters: formatCurrency, formatDate, formatDateTime, formatCPF, formatPhone, formatAccount, maskCPF, formatRelativeTime

design_system_compliance.colors: 100% — todas as cores do design_spec.md no tailwind.config.ts + CSS variables
design_system_compliance.scrollbar: Estilizado com cores do design system

next_step: QA verifica qualidade, testa integração e gera relatório
